title: UCP promises to allow mandatory drug treatment, open addiction and mental health beds
notes: Primary source for EVT-115. Smith announces the proposed Compassionate Intervention Act at a Calgary news conference May 15 2023 (article dated May 16). Would allow family members, doctors, psychologists, or police to petition a court for involuntary addiction treatment. NDP Leader Notley: 'forced recovery is not successful.' Experts warn the proposal violates Charter-protected rights. No byline confirmed. URL needs HTTP check.
